ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the review (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity of the review (0-1) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes (helpful and unhelpful) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to write the review (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_status" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is in stock */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer joined */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "purchase_count" INTEGER /* Total number of purchases made by the customer */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "loyalty_level" TEXT /* Customer's loyalty level (e.g., bronze, silver, gold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_sentiments" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being analyzed */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the review (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis (0-1) */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Polarity score of the sentiment (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "polarity_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the polarity score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_subjectivities" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being analyzed */,
  "subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity of the review (0-1) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the subjectivity analysis (0-1) */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Polarity score of the subjectivity (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "polarity_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the polarity score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_tokens" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being tokenized */,
  "token" TEXT /* Tokenized text of the review */,
  "token_type" TEXT /* Type of token (e.g., word, punctuation, emoji) */,
  "token_position" INTEGER /* Position of the token in the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id", "token")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_stems" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being stemmed */,
  "stem" TEXT /* Stemmed text of the review */,
  "stem_type" TEXT /* Type of stem (e.g., root, suffix) */,
  "stem_position" INTEGER /* Position of the stem in the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id", "stem")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_lemmas" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being lemmatized */,
  "lemma" TEXT /* Lemmatized text of the review */,
  "lemma_type" TEXT /* Type of lemma (e.g., base form, inflected form) */,
  "lemma_position" INTEGER /* Position of the lemma in the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id", "lemma")
)

CREATE TABLE "pos_tags" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being tagged */,
  "token" TEXT /* Tokenized text of the review */,
  "pos_tag" TEXT /* Part-of-speech tag for the token */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of part-of-speech tag (e.g., noun, verb, adjective) */,
  "tag_position" INTEGER /* Position of the tag in the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id", "token")
)

CREATE TABLE "filtered_pos_tags" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being tagged */,
  "token" TEXT /* Tokenized text of the review */,
  "pos_tag" TEXT /* Filtered part-of-speech tag for the token */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of filtered part-of-speech tag (e.g., noun, verb, adjective) */,
  "tag_position" INTEGER /* Position of the tag in the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id", "token")
)
